untranslatable_reason: Signal requires statistical tests (ADF/KPSS stationarity testing) and rolling mean deviation calculations that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators do not include: (1) ADF/KPSS p-value outputs for mean-reversion confirmation, (2) rolling mean with custom 252-period window, (3) standard deviation bands with custom 2.0x multiplier for deviation measurement. These are advanced time-series analysis features that require custom calculations beyond the provided indicator library.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires statistical hypothesis testing (Augmented Dickey-Fuller or KPSS test with p < 0.01) and dynamic rolling statistics that cannot be expressed using the allowed indicator set. A practical approximation would substitute Bollinger Bands (bb_upper/bb_lower with standard settings) for deviation measurement, but this would not preserve the original signal's statistical rigor. Recommend: (1) implementing custom ADF/KPSS indicators, or (2) using bb_upper and bb_lower crossovers as a proxy for mean-reversion entry/exit.
